category_sources: source_facts.description says filebrowser is a Web File Browser.
source_facts.homepage is the official filebrowser.org website.
display_name_sources: Official filebrowser.org website presents the project as File Browser.
source_facts.description uses Web File Browser as the product description.
docs_sources: Official filebrowser.org includes configuration documentation and is the official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/filebrowser/filebrowser, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies it as a web file browser.
source_facts.executables lists the filebrowser server executable.
